# apps/web

Next.js 15 application providing AI-powered pitch presentation viewer and document Q&A interface with Supabase backend integration and shadcn/ui components.

## Stack

**Framework**: Next.js 16.1.7 (App Router) with React 19.1.0, TypeScript 5.9.3  
**Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4.2.1 (PostCSS plugin), shadcn/ui with base-nova theme, CSS variables for dual color space (HSL/OKLCH)  
**Backend Integration**: Supabase client (@supabase/supabase-js 2.99.2, @supabase/ssr 0.9.0), proxies `/api/v1/*` to backend via `next.config.ts` rewrites  
**UI Libraries**: lucide-react icons, sonner toasts, react-markdown with remark-gfm, react-intersection-observer  
**Type System**: Shared types from `packages/shared-types`, strict mode with bundler resolution  

**Entry Points**:
- `app/page.tsx` â€” health monitoring dashboard
- `app/documents/page.tsx` â€” document upload/management
- `app/pitch/page.tsx` â€” pitch viewer route
- `app/query/page.tsx` â€” Q&A interface
- `app/api/health/route.ts` â€” frontend health endpoint

**Scripts**: `dev` (next dev), `build` (next build), `start` (next start), `lint` (next lint), `typecheck` (tsc --noEmit)

## Contents

**[components.json](./components.json)** â€” shadcn/ui config: base-nova style, RSC enabled, lucide icons, Tailwind integration with neutral base color, path aliases `@/components`, `@/lib/utils`, `@/components/ui`  
**[next.config.ts](./next.config.ts)** â€” `nextConfig` with `rewrites()` proxying `/api/v1/:path*` to `BACKEND_URL` (default `http://localhost:8000`)  
**[package.json](./package.json)** â€” @zeee/web package definition with Next.js 16.1.7, Supabase clients, Tailwind 4.2.1, shadcn/ui dependencies  
**[postcss.config.mjs](./postcss.config.mjs)** â€” PostCSS config with `@tailwindcss/postcss` plugin for Tailwind v4 processing  
**[tsconfig.json](./tsconfig.json)** â€” TypeScript config: ES2017 target, esnext modules, react-jsx transform, strict mode, `@/*` alias to `./`, includes `.next/types/**/*.ts`

## Subdirectories

**[app/](./app/)** â€” Next.js App Router root with `RootLayout`, `globals.css` theme system, health dashboard `page.tsx`, route segments for `/documents`, `/pitch`, `/query`, `/api/health`  
**[components/](./components/)** â€” React components grouped by feature: `documents/` (upload/delete/replace UI), `qa/` (chat thread), `query/` (Q&A input/streaming/citations), `ui/` (shadcn primitives), `viewer/` (pitch presentation sections)  
**[hooks/](./hooks/)** â€” `use-active-section` (TOC highlighting with click-lock), `use-query-stream` (WebSocket-based LLM streaming)  
**[lib/](./lib/)** â€” API clients (`api.ts`, `pitch-api.ts`, `query-api.ts`), data transformers (`parse-table-content.ts`), UI utils (`utils.ts` with clsx/tailwind-merge)

## Architecture

**API Proxy Layer**: Next.js rewrites route all `/api/v1/*` requests to backend server (`BACKEND_URL` env var), enabling same-origin API calls from client components.  

**Theme System**: Dual color space tokens in `app/globals.css` (HSL `--color-*` for legacy, OKLCH `--*` for new components), light theme in `:root`, dark theme in `.dark` class, radius multipliers from `--radius` base (0.625rem).  

**Component Library**: shadcn/ui components in `components/ui/` with base-nova styling, barrel re-exports, CVA variants for size/color props.  

**Data Flow**: Client components â†’ `lib/api.ts` clients â†’ Next.js `/api/v1/*` proxy â†’ backend FastAPI endpoints. Pitch viewer fetches via `pitch-api.ts`, Q&A streams via WebSocket in `use-query-stream.ts`.

## Path Aliases

`@/components` â†’ `components/`, `@/lib/utils` â†’ `lib/utils.ts`, `@/components/ui` â†’ `components/ui/`, `@/lib` â†’ `lib/`, `@/hooks` â†’ `hooks/`

## Behavioral Contracts

### Document Status States
`status: "pending" | "processing" | "ready" | "error"` (from `lib/api.ts` `Document` type)

### Document Purpose Values
`purpose: "pitch" | "rag"` (from `lib/api.ts` `Document` type)

### Pitch Chunk Types
`chunk_type: "text" | "table" | "heading" | "image_caption"` (from `lib/pitch-api.ts` `PitchChunk` type)

### Query Status Lifecycle
`QueryStatus: "idle" | "retrieving" | "generating" | "done" | "error"` (from `hooks/use-query-stream.ts`)

### WebSocket Message Protocol
Message types: `status` (updates `QueryStatus`), `token` (appends to `answer` string), `citations` (sets `Citation[]`), `done` (terminal success), `error` (terminal failure with `message` field)

### Health Polling
`/api/health` returns `{status: 'healthy'|'degraded', frontend: 'ok', backend: 'ok'|'degraded'|'unreachable', database: 'ok'|'unreachable', timestamp: string}`. Error fallback sets `backend: 'unreachable', database: 'unreachable'`.

### Document Polling Interval
`POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 3000`, `POLL_TIMEOUT_MS = 300000` (from `app/documents/page.tsx`)

### Active Section Lock Duration
`forceActive` lock: **1200ms** (from `hooks/use-active-section.ts`)

### File Size Formatting
`formatFileSize(bytes: number | null): string` â€” returns `"0 KB"` if null, `<1MB` as KB with 1 decimal, `â‰Ą1MB` as MB with 1 decimal (from `lib/api.ts`)

### Markdown Table Parsing
Separator row pattern: `^\|[\s-|]+\|$`, requires `|`-delimited rows with â‰Ą2 cells (label, value, optional subLabel) (from `lib/parse-table-content.ts`)

### Active Section Selection Algorithm
`pickTopmost` selects section with smallest `Math.abs(getBoundingClientRect().top)`. When `bestTop < -200`, prefers sections with `top > bestTop`. Respects lock when `Date.now() < lockUntil.current`. (from `hooks/use-active-section.ts`)
